MASTER CALENDAR JURY

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-09-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arnold W. Evje II, Esq. for Plaintiff, Tenderloin Housing Clinic
Thomas Jirasak and Shawn Hughes, Witnesses for Plaintiff


Re-assignment from Presiding Judge's Dept. scheduled for court trial for prove-up hearing
No appearance by defendant, Ronald Richardson.
Witnesses were sworn.
Exhibit 1, 3 Day Notice, was admitted into evidence and returned to counsel.
After evidence and testimony was heard, the court grants judgment for plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of premises to Plaintiff located at: 520 South Van Ness Ave #337, SF, CA.
Costs of $148.30
Lease forfeited
Judgment signed in open court.
